The '''Stiletto security droid''' was developed by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Designed as a 1-meter tall cylindrical [[Droid/Legends|droid]] on an efficient [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]], the droid was used mainly in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] for guarding various [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]]. It was equipped with a light [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]], reflective plate armor, a [[Neuro-Saav Corporation|NeuroSaav]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] suite, and a NeuroSaav [[biorecognition package]]. They were slow-moving but had an excellent [[Targeting computer/Legends|targeting package]] not unlike that of the [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]]. It cost 7,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and was only available to the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]]. The model was introduced early in the days of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], then discontinued for almost two decades before being remarketed for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
